insight_events.title: Operating cash flow decelerating
insight_events.summary: Operating cash flow growth moved from -117.0% to -84.4% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Negative evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

insight_events.title: Growth regime downshift
insight_events.summary: Growth regime downshift: YoY growth moved to +7.1% to -84.4% YoY (baseline median +10.8% YoY) for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Negative evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.
